hobbies.title: Hobbies
hobbies.coffee: Kalita Wave dripper, specialty beans, and a morning ritual I take way too seriously. Always chasing that perfect pour.
hobbies.gym: Strength training — nothing fancy, just consistency and progressive overload. Squats are non-negotiable.
hobbies.sports: Love watching both. Shohei Ohtani fan since day one — the guy just doesn't stop. Rugby's my go-to for weekend watching.
hobbies.travel: Qantas points, credit card strategy, and way too much time on OzBargain. Getting business class on economy effort is the real hobby.
hobbies.homelab: Proxmox cluster, Kubernetes nodes, private cloud experiments. Breaking things at home so I don't break them at work.
hobbies.dora: 14-year-old dog and the real boss of the house. Everything else revolves around her schedule.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.availability: Open to conversations about APAC enterprise security and developer tooling.
about.title: Biography
about.bio:
I'm a Solutions Engineer based in Sydney, working at GitHub across the APAC region. My focus is helping enterprise teams get the most out of GitHub Copilot and GitHub Advanced Security — from initial demos and proof-of-concepts through to production rollouts. I work extensively with Japanese enterprise customers and operate bilingually across English and Japanese.

Before GitHub, I spent several years at Sysdig as a Customer Solutions Engineer covering APAC, with a strong focus on Japan. I worked with organisations like Square Enix, NTT Data, and NTT Docomo on container security, Kubernetes, and cloud-native application protection. That time gave me a deep appreciation for the complexity of securing modern infrastructure at enterprise scale.

My technical background spans cloud infrastructure, DevSecOps, and runtime security — with hands-on experience across Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Terraform, GCP, and AWS. I moved from Japan to Australia in 2011 and bring a cross-cultural perspective to every customer engagement, which turns out to matter a lot when working across the APAC region.

Outside of work, you'll find me brewing coffee on a Kalita Wave dripper, running a Proxmox home lab, or checking if Shohei Ohtani did something ridiculous again. Dora, my 14-year-old dog, supervises all of the above.
experience.content:
GitHub — Solutions Engineer III

  • Location: Sydney, Australia
  • Region: APAC
  • Focus: GitHub Copilot, GitHub Advanced Security (GHAS)
  • Key activities: Customer demos, PoCs, enterprise accounts, bilingual EN/JP support
  • Notable: First solo GHAS deal (Paysauce, NZ); PoC sessions for EstimateOne

Sysdig — Customer Solutions Engineer

  • Region: APAC, Japan focus
  • Key accounts: Square Enix, NTT Data, NTT Docomo, Zerobank Design, Contact Energy, Bullish
  • Focus: Container security, CNAPP, Kubernetes, Falco, runtime security
